PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Home Page ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; Write-Host "=== Vehicle API ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/vehicles/api/list -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; Write-Host "=== Login Page ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/login -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; Write-Host "=== Register Page ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/register -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Test Register ==="; $body = '{"username":"testuser","password":"123456","realName":"测试用户","phone":"13800138000","email":"test@test.com"}'; $res = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Register Result: code=$\($res.code\), msg=$\($res.message\)"; Write-Host "=== Test Admin Login ==="; $body2 = '{"username":"admin1","password":"admin123456"}'; $res2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Admin Login: code=$\($res2.code\), msg=$\($res2.message\)")

PowerShell($html = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/register -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "=== Status: $\($html.StatusCode\) ==="; $content = $html.Content; Write-Host "=== Has form: $\($content -match 'registerForm'\) ==="; Write-Host "=== Has novalidate: $\($content -match 'novalidate'\) ==="; Write-Host "=== Has script: $\($content -match 'addEventListener'\) ===")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $html = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/register -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($html.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Has novalidate: $\($html.Content -match 'novalidate'\)"; Write-Host "Has JS validation: $\($html.Content -match '用户名不能为空'\)")

PowerShell($idx = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/ -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "=== Index cards clickable: $\($idx.Content -match 'href=.?/vehicles.?.?.?class=.?text-decoration-none'\) ==="; Write-Host "=== 我的预约 link: $\($idx.Content -match '/appointments/user'\) ==="; Write-Host "=== No broken /user/appointments: $\($idx.Content -notmatch '/user/appointments'\) ===")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $idx = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/ -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($idx.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Cards have links: $\($idx.Content -match 'text-decoration-none'\)"; Write-Host "My appointments fixed: $\($idx.Content -match '/appointments/user'\)")

PowerShell($session = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $loginBody = '{"username":"admin1","password":"admin123456"}'; $loginRes = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $loginBody -SessionVariable session -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Login: code=$\($loginRes.code\)"; $page = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/appointments/user -WebSession $session -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Appointments page: $\($page.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $page = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/ -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($page.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Has doLogout function: $\($page.Content -match 'doLogout'\)")

PowerShell($token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzM4NCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsInVzZXJJZCI6MSwicm9sZXMiOiJBRE1JTiIsImlhdCI6MTc3OTkzMDMyMywiZXhwIjoxNzgwMDE2NzIzfQ.8RPQVBt7MYcTDU3BJ1ej8i6Q-Z4rbgx-NxXSbdBswbo3gAcSQQ4VuqX_IQQ4RG0S"; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $r1 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/me" -Headers $headers; Write-Output "=== /api/auth/me ==="; Write-Output "User: $\($r1.data.username\), Role count: $\($r1.data.roleCodes.Count\)"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/system/users" -Headers $headers; Write-Output "`n=== /api/system/users ==="; Write-Output "Total users: $\($r2.data.total\), First user: $\($r2.data.records[0].username\)"; $r3 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/report/kpi" -Headers $headers; Write-Output "`n=== /api/report/kpi ==="; Write-Output "KPI: $\($r3.data | ConvertTo-Json\)")

PowerShell(docker cp D:\\Java\\Project1\\src\\main\\resources\\schema.sql mysql-project:/tmp/schema.sql 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 project1 -e "source /tmp/schema.sql" 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 -e "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'customer_%'" project1 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 -e "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'mall_%'" project1 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 -e "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'rescue_%'" project1 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 -e "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'accident_%'" project1 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 -e "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'valuation_%'" project1 2>&1)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; $uri = "http://localhost:8080/api/client/login"; $body = '{"phone":"13900001111"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $uri -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Output "=== Login ==="; Write-Output "CustomerID: $\($r.data.customerId\), Name: $\($r.data.name\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($custId = 1; $r1 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/vehicles?customerId=$custId" -Method GET; Write-Output "=== My Vehicles ==="; Write-Output "Count: $\($r1.data.Count\)"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/points?customerId=$custId" -Method GET; Write-Output "=== My Points ==="; Write-Output "Points: $\($r2.data.totalPoints\), Level: $\($r2.data.memberLevel\)"; $r3 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/products?page=1&size=5" -Method GET; Write-Output "=== Mall Products ==="; Write-Output "Total: $\($r3.data.total\)"; $r4 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/reminders?customerId=$custId" -Method GET; Write-Output "=== Reminders ==="; Write-Output "Count: $\($r4.data.Count\)")

PowerShell(docker cp D:\\Java\\Project1\\src\\main\\resources\\schema.sql mysql-project:/tmp/schema.sql 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 project1 -e "source /tmp/schema.sql" 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 -e "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'kb_%'" project1 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 -e "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'cs_%'" project1 2>&1; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS faq_count FROM kb_faq" project1 2>&1)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; $body = '{"sessionId":"test-001","customerId":1,"message":"保养一次多少钱"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/chat" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Output "=== AI Chat Test 1 ==="; Write-Output "Reply: $\($r.data.reply\)"; Write-Output "Source: $\($r.data.source\)"; Write-Output "Transfer: $\($r.data.transferToHuman\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($r1 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/chat/faq/search?keyword=保养" -Method GET; Write-Output "=== FAQ Search ==="; Write-Output "Found: $\($r1.data.Count\) results"; foreach \($item in $r1.data\) { Write-Output "  Q: $\($item.question\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; $body = '{"sessionId":"test-002","customerId":1,"message":"首保什么时候做"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/chat" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Output "=== AI Chat: 首保什么时候做 ==="; Write-Output "Reply: $\($r.data.reply.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $r.data.reply.Length\)\)\)..."; Write-Output "Source: $\($r.data.source\)"; Write-Output "Transfer: $\($r.data.transferToHuman\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"sessionId":"test-003","customerId":1,"message":"我要转人工客服"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/chat" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Output "=== 转人工测试 ==="; Write-Output "Transfer: $\($r.data.transferToHuman\)"; Write-Output "TicketNo: $\($r.data.ticketNo\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" }; $tickets = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/chat/tickets/pending" -Method GET; Write-Output "=== 待处理工单 ==="; Write-Output "Count: $\($tickets.data.Count\)"; if \($tickets.data.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Output "First: $\($tickets.data[0].ticketNo\) - $\($tickets.data[0].status\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; $body = '{"sessionId":"test-004","customerId":1,"message":"我要转人工客服"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/chat" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Output "=== 转人工测试 ==="; Write-Output "Transfer: $\($r.data.transferToHuman\)"; Write-Output "TicketNo: $\($r.data.ticketNo\)"; Write-Output "Reply preview: $\($r.data.reply.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(50, $r.data.reply.Length\)\)\)...")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; $body = '{"sessionId":"test-005","customerId":1,"message":"转人工"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/client/chat" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Output "Transfer: $\($r.data.transferToHuman\)"; Write-Output "TicketNo: $\($r.data.ticketNo\)")
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing; $content = $r.Content; if \($content -match "润达4S"\) { Write-Output "首页中文正常" } else { Write-Output "首页中文异常" })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path D:\\Java\\Project1\\frontend\\dist\\index.html\) { $c = Get-Content D:\\Java\\Project1\\frontend\\dist\\index.html -Raw -Encoding UTF8; if \($c -match "润达"\) { Write-Output "dist/index.html OK" } else { Write-Output "dist/index.html 乱码"; Write-Output $c.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$c.Length\)\) } } else { Write-Output "No dist/index.html" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; Write-Output $r.Headers['Content-Type']; $bytes = $r.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $match = [regex]::Match\($text, '"realName":"\([^"]+\)"'\); if \($match.Success\) { Write-Output "realName: $\($match.Groups[1].Value\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json;charset=utf-8" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; Write-Output "Content-Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($r.Content.ReadAsByteArray\(\)\); $match = [regex]::Match\($text, '"realName":"\([^"]+\)"'\); if \($match.Success\) { Write-Output "realName: $\($match.Groups[1].Value\)" })

PowerShell(docker cp D:\\Java\\Project1\\src\\main\\resources\\fix_charset.sql mysql-project:/tmp/fix_charset.sql; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 project1 -e "source /tmp/fix_charset.sql" 2>&1; Write-Output "=== 验证角色表 ==="; docker exec mysql-project mysql -uroot -proot123 project1 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "SELECT id, role_name, description FROM sys_role" project1 2>&1)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; $bytes = $r.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); if \($text -match '系统管理员'\) { Write-Output "OK - 系统管理员" } else { Write-Output "FAIL" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 25; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; $bytes = $r.RawContentStream.ToArray\(\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); if \($text -match '系统管理员'\) { Write-Output "OK - 系统管理员" } else { Write-Output "FAIL - $text" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; Write-Output "Login OK"; Write-Output "realName: $\($r.data.realName\)" } catch { Write-Output "Not ready yet: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($r.Content.ReadAsByteArray\(\)\); if \($text -match '"系统管理员"'\) { Write-Output "OK - 系统管理员 in response" } else { Write-Output $text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $text.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; $token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'\).data.token; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Output "=== 用户数 ==="; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/system/users" -Headers $headers; Write-Output "Total: $\($r.data.total\)"; Write-Output "=== 客户数 ==="; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/crm/customers" -Headers $headers; Write-Output "Total: $\($r.data.total\)"; Write-Output "=== 库存数 ==="; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/stock/vehicles" -Headers $headers; Write-Output "Total: $\($r.data.total\)"; Write-Output "=== KPI ==="; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/report/kpi" -Headers $headers; $r.data | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; Write-Output "Login: $\($r.data.realName\)"; $token=$r.data.token; $headers=@{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $v=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/stock/vehicles?size=5" -Headers $headers; Write-Output "Vehicles:"; $v.data.records | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.brand\) $\($_.model\) - $\($_.color\)" })

PowerShell($url = "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1603584173870-7f23fdae1b7a?w=800"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Unsplash: OK \($\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "Unsplash: FAILED - $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 25; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/stock/vehicles?page=1&size=3" -Method GET; Write-Output "Total: $\($r.data.total\)"; $r.data.records | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.brand\) $\($_.model\) - $\($_.color\) - $\($_.guidePrice\)" })
